programme.title: Half Baked
programme.desc: When a member of their crew gets arrested for killing a New York City police horse by feeding it junk food, three slackin' stoners are forced to get off their butts and raise bail by selling pot stolen from a pharmaceutical lab. It's a risky plan but, hey, these are stand-up guys who would do anything to help out a friend in need.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mallrats
programme.desc: T.S. (Jeremy London) and his best friend, Brodie (Jason Lee), take a trip to the mall after their girlfriends break up with them. T.S.'s girlfriend, Brandi (Claire Forlani), is participating in a dating game show at the mall, which was the initial cause of their breakup. Meanwhile, Brodie's ex, Rene (Shannen Doherty), has begun dating sleazy store manager Shannon (Ben Affleck). T.S. and Brodie seek out ways to ruin the game show, hunted all the while by Brandi's father, Jared (Michael Rooker).

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: This coming-of-age film follows the mayhem of a group of rowdy teenagers in Austin, Texas, celebrating the last day of high school in 1976. The graduating class heads for a popular pool hall and joins an impromptu keg party, however star football player Randall Pink Floyd has promised to focus on the championship game and abstain from partying. Meanwhile, the incoming freshmen try to avoid being hazed by the seniors, most notably the sadistic bully Fred O'Bannion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: The Big Lebowski
programme.desc: Jeff Bridges plays Jeff Lebowski who insists on being called "the Dude," a laid-back, easygoing burnout who happens to have the same name as a millionaire whose wife owes a lot of dangerous people a whole bunch of money -- resulting in the Dude having his rug soiled, sending him spiraling into the Los Angeles underworld.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: An unemployed pot-smoking slacker and amateur drummer, Anthony Stoner (Tommy Chong) ditches his strict parents and hits the road, eventually meeting kindred spirit Pedro de Pacas (Cheech Marin). While the drug-ingesting duo is soon arrested for possession of marijuana, Anthony and Pedro get released on a technicality, allowing them to continue their many misadventures and ultimately compete in a rock band contest, where they perform the raucous tune "Earache My Eye.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A replacement judge (Ann Turkel) jails Christine on contempt charges.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: A minor earthquake leaves Dan, Roz and two sumo wrestlers trapped in an elevator.

programme.title: Night Court
programme.desc: While Harry (Harry Anderson) is attempting to help a South Pacific princess avoid an arranged marriage, her brother pursues Christine (Markie Post). Jeanne Mori guest stars.

programme.title: Wet Hot American Summer
programme.desc: Set on the last day of camp, in the hot summer of 1981, "Wet Hot American Summer" follows a group of counselors who are each trying to complete their unfinished business before the day ends. The entire summer of pent-up sexual frustrations, unresolved post-traumatic stress, pending separations and of course, the talent show, all weigh heavily on the minds and groins of counselors and campers alike.

It's a risky plan but, hey, these are stand-up guys who would do anything to help out a friend in need.

The graduating class heads for a popular pool hall and joins an impromptu keg party, however star football player Randall Pink Floyd has promised to focus on the championship game and abstain from partying. programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert undergoes a radical change when he starts hanging out with his partner and her friends.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert create a testimonial video for their father after he is elected the lodge's "Man of the Year.".

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes on a Caribbean cruise with Marie after Frank hurts his knee.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Doug Heffernan comes over to hang out with Ray while Debra and the kids are away for the weekend.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's press pass is refused when he and Robert visit the Baseball Hall of Fame; with former New York Mets Bud Harrelson, Ron Swoboda, Cleon Jones, Tug McGraw, Tommie Agee, Jerry Grote, Ed Kranepool and Art Shamsky.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray confesses to Debra that her cuddly sleeping position is preventing him from getting his rest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray feel pressure to show each other a good time on a romantic weekend getaway.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra gets a part-time job, leaving Ray to fend for himself.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to be nicer to each other; Ray meets Doug at Dr. Becker's office.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray urges Debra to go dancing with Robert but becomes increasingly jealous of the situation.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray offers his basement office to Robert and Amy when they want to be alone.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra prepare Ally for her first play date and reflect on their own first meeting and kiss.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After a PTA meeting Debra makes a comment about a mother who had a breast enhancement and gets upset after seeing Ray's reaction; when Ray returns home from a trip, Debra has a "big" surprise for him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The family is forced to take sides when Ray and Debra have a fight over a new can opener and each relates the story of what happened with radically different viewpoints.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After an accidental tip-off from Ray which allows him to win a bet, Frank makes everyone suspicious when he begins to show an unusual interest in Ray's work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Tired and dispirited, Ray and Debra ask Ray's parents about their sex life, and are surprised at their response.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra try to decide who should care for their children in case anything should happen to them.

programme.desc: Debra is upset when her sister, Jennifer, decides to become a nun.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra points out that Ray is just like his annoying cousin Gerard, a charge his family gleefully reinforces.

programme.desc: Ray is happily surprised, and curious, when Debra starts initiating sex more often.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Luther believes Hayden deliberately sold him a broken-down truck and reports him to a consumer affairs watchdog.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden arranges a date for Kelly with his star player (Rob Youngblood).

programme.title: Coach
programme.sub-title: Any Place I Hang Myself Is Home
programme.desc: Hayden grudgingly agrees to go house hunting with Christine, then upsets her when he buys a house without consulting her.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden must plan a memorial for someone he barely knew because the man died and left everything to the coach.

programme.title: Coach
programme.sub-title: I Think I Can't, I Think I Can't
programme.desc: Hayden endures an excruciating train trip when Luther trades in their plane tickets following a dream about a plane crash.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden regrets his honesty when Christine learns how he feels about her best friend (Lee Garlington).

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: Hayden is beaten before he plays his first bowl game when he learns the opposing coach is his former mentor.

programme.title: Coach
programme.desc: A bizarre limbo accident sidelines the team's star player prior to the Pineapple Bowl.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is beside himself when his new Puerto Rican neighbor opens a competing junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred accidentally fires an antique gun and fears the worst when his neighbor doesn't answer.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred is forced to find a new partner for the junkyard when Lamont seeks employment elsewhere.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.sub-title: Sanford and Son and Sister Makes Three
programme.desc: Lamont discovers that his new fiancee may actually be his half sister.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: A bum threatens to sue Fred when he accidentally injures himself in the junkyard.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred invites his fiancee and a door-to-door saleswoman to dinner on the same evening.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: When Fred receives a slight injury in a car mishap, Lamont hires a housekeeper to help out.

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Fred and Lamont throw a neighborhood party in an effort to raise money to pay their bills.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack plays cupid for his date's widowed father.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet tells her parents she and Jack are married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet try to thwart a wealthy man's efforts to make Cindy his bride.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Fired Furley moves in with the roommates.
